item.title: Resume
item.description: Last updated on 2021-02-01. For up-to-date information see also my LinkedIn profile. Contact Info altmeyerpat@gmail.com GitHub Patrick Altmeyer Currently searching for a PhD student position I am currently looking for PhD opportunities to perform cutting-edge research on the intersection of explainable AI, financial markets and economics. Education Barcelona Graduate School of Economics MSc Data Science Barcelona, Spain 2021 Thesis: - Barcelona Graduate School of Economics MSc Finance
